path.style: fill: none; stroke: #b8c0cc; stroke-width: 1.1; stroke-linecap: round

text.style: fill: #263238; font: 700 10px 'Times New Roman', 'Times', 'Nimbus Roman', 'DejaVu Serif', serif; text-anchor: start
